aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a decent foundation for AI visibility but lacks structured content and authority signals to ensure AI models prioritize them in recommendations.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to highlight common questions and answers.
Create content that directly addresses common customer queries in a conversational tone.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate contact information.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
Q&A section is not actively managed.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any new citations to ensure ongoing accuracy.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common services
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed properties

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'dryer vent cleaning near me' and 'handyman services in Katy'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema and adding conversational FAQs.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, expertise, and detailed service explanations to establish authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for the assistants powering tomorrow's searches.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their GBP is strong, but AI models overlook them due to the lack of structured and conversational content.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational FAQs, and authority-building content to make your business the top choice for AI recommendations.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI; act now to secure your position before they dominate the space.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your Katy Business Today!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and Google Business Profile and found significant opportunities to boost your visibility with AI models.
cta: Let's discuss how our AEO strategy can position your business as the top choice for AI recommendations.
